bead.title: auth-federation: users/user_identities auto-provision + Tailscale synthesis
bead.acceptance:
- [ ] StorageAdapter trait has upsert_user_identity with ADR-018 §6 ON CONFLICT semantics
- [ ] Memory, SQLite, and Postgres adapters all implement it
- [ ] crates/axon-server/src/federation.rs exists with resolve_tailscale_identity
- [ ] crates/axon-server/tests/federation_test.rs has 5 tests: fresh upsert, idempotent repeat, 64-way concurrent convergence, second-provider-no-merge, federation-wrapper
- [ ] Concurrent convergence test (INV-021 primitive) passes on memory AND sqlite
- [ ] No check-then-insert patterns in the new code (grep assertion in test or manual review)
- [ ] cargo test -p axon-storage green
- [ ] cargo test -p axon-server --test federation_test green
- [ ] cargo clippy --workspace -- -D warnings clean
- [ ] B1's auth_pipeline_test.rs + auth_pipeline_integration_test.rs + auth_rejection_matrix.rs still green (this bead is additive)
